title: Counting Principles: The Rule of Sum and Product
description: A flowchart illustrating the decision-making process for applying the Rule of Sum (for exclusive choices) and the Rule of Product (for sequential choices) in counting problems.
elements: Decision: Are choices made in sequence?
relationships: Decision leads to Rule of Product Path if 'Yes'
Decision leads to Rule of Sum Path if 'No'
Both paths lead to Task Outcomes
